title: lantana camara var. hybrida
intro: Lantana camara var. hybrida, also known as the hardy lantana or compact lantana, is a shrub-like flowering plant that is native to the Americas and is commonly cultivated for its attractive clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lantana camara var. hybrida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other viral infections. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
